snippet.description:
VOY PA LA CALLE . ROCHYRD ‚ĚĆ MOZART LA PARA .

Pa ‚Äė la calle vamos al ūüíĮ hay que prenderla t√ļ sabe con to‚Äô lo hierro apagando Vela . (Eh) t√ļ no me llega te pongo a gastar la suela mojan si se est√° buscando ahora agr√©gale que suena .

                        CORO
Voy Pa ‚Äė la calle hoy en alta , no se cuando regreso , siento que ya hasta me hace falta me voy con pal‚Äô de peso . Voy Pa la calle hoy , voy pa‚Äô la calle hoy.... voy pa‚Äô la calle hoy ...(X2)

Pa‚Äô la calle voy normal siempre ando con pal de peso menol yo lo joceaba siempre estoy puesto Pa‚Äô eso nunca me detuvieron ni coro era travieso tamo activo en la Avenida Dando saco e‚Äô cabra (EL HUESO).

Toy burlao la humildad es que no se pierde careta Pa ‚Äė lo caretuse el que se quilla pierde rulin de verdad mezclo to‚Äô en el mismo vaso cuando toy‚Äô medio mariao empezamos a beber al paso pa‚Äô la calle son al ūüíĮ hay que prenderla t√ļ sabe con to‚Äô lo hierro apagando vela , t√ļ no me llega te pongo a gastar la suela mojan si se ta buscando ahora agr√©gale que suena . 


                       MOZART 
Pa‚Äô la calle voy toy cansado de estar en la casa otra resaca pero en eso se me pasa de que vale tener pila de cuarto si usted no goza hay veces que uno manga pal‚Äô de peso y lo explota un flow nuevo un cerquillo es suficiente yo me quito y me pongo cuando vuelvo doy corriente yo soy de un barrio pero de un barrio caliente y a mi no me de muela que yo tengo mi Expediente.
Si el sol sale me acuesto la para dando la para pa‚Äô la calle yo estoy puesto la fila de los party m√≠o son como la del metro ven vakeame lo perro de los pies que estoy en retro .

snippet.title: GAME RECAP: Lakers 103, Warriors 100
snippet.description: The Lakers defeated the Warriors, 103-100. LeBron James recorded a triple-double with 22 points, 11 rebounds and 10 assists for the Lakers, including the go-ahead 3pt FG with 58.2 seconds remaining in regulation, while Anthony Davis added 25 points (20 in the 2nd half) and 12 rebounds in the victory. Stephen Curry led all scorers with 37 points and 7 rebounds for the Warriors in the losing effort.

localized.title: GAME RECAP: Lakers 103, Warriors 100

Stephen Curry led all scorers with 37 points and 7 rebounds for the Warriors in the losing effort.

LETRA

(Amenazzy)
Aaaaaahhh Amenazzy, a ese novio la dejo, ahora quiere despegar la mente y jangueal‚Äô,
Cansada de trabajar, de la monoton√≠a de todos los d√≠as,
Sali√≥, se fue, se ve que est√° mejor ahora que est√° sin √©l, 
Dice que no vuelve pa atr√°s,
Que la vida es una, y que el tiempo vuela, 
Que prefiere estar sola, que mal acompa√Īada otra vez.

(Jay Wheeler)
Ella dice que los amores, son de novela,
Muchos le tiran, pero ella r√°pido los cancela,
Y si vieras la foto que sube en traje de ba√Īo, no quiere amores, porque ya le hicieron da√Īo,
Lleva soltera m√°s de un a√Īo, su ex le escribe dici√©ndole te extra√Īo, 
Pero, pichea porque dice, que sola est√° mejor 
y frontea, no quiere saber nada de amor
 y pichea, porque dice que soltera est√° mejor  
Frontea, no quiere saber nada de amor.

(Amenazzy)
Sali√≥, se fue, se ve que est√° mejor, 
Ahora que est√° sin √©l, 
dice que no vuelve pa atr√°s,

(Jay Wheeler)
Que la vida es una, y que el tiempo vuela, 
Prefiere estar sola, que mal acompa√Īada otra vez.

(Amenazzy)

El coraz√≥n vac√≠o, pero la copa est√° llena, 
culo grande, piel canela, 
disfruta la vida ahora que est√° soltera, 
que est√° libre y puede hacer lo que quiera (eyyy), 
anda con una amiga que es su c√≥mplice, 
si se pasan de tragos, van a besarse, 
por ahora solo quiere liberarse, 
que nadie le recuerde al bobo ese, 
ahora hace todo lo que contigo no hac√≠a (aahhh), 
ahora fuma, bebe y llega al otro d√≠a, 
ahora hace todo lo que contigo no hac√≠a (aahhh), 
ahora fuma, bebe y llega al otro d√≠a.

(Jay Wheeler)
Sali√≥, se fue, 
Se ve que est√° mejor, ahora que est√° sin √©l, 
Dice que no vuelve pa‚Äô atr√°s.

(Amenazzy)
Que la vida es una, y que el tiempo vuela, 
Que prefiere estar sola, 
Que mal acompa√Īada otra vez.
Suena de fondo

(Ahora hace todo lo que contigo no hacia aahhh, ahora fuma, bebe y llega al otro d√≠a,)

snippet.title: Friends: The Reunion | Official Trailer | HBO Max
snippet.description:
Our favorite friends are back on the set that started it all. Jennifer Aniston, Courteney Cox, Lisa Kudrow, Matt LeBlanc, Matthew Perry, David Schwimmer, and special guests reunite to discuss everything from their casting process to whether or not Ross and Rachel were really on a break. Witness the unbreakable bond of the group that perfectly captured the moment in life when your friends become your family.

Stream Friends: The Reunion May 27 on HBO Max.

snippet.title: The NBA Arrives In Fortnite
snippet.description:
Lace up... The Crossover is going to knock you off your feet. https://fn.gg/NBA

For the first time ever, the NBA is joining Fortnite! Coinciding with the debut of the State Farm NBA Play-In Tournament, Fortnite x NBA: The Crossover brings basketball‚Äôs best into the Item Shop and Fortnite Creative, and with Team Battles, a unique experience featuring all 30 NBA teams in Fortnite.

Debuting on May 21 at 8pm ET, players can suit up and rep any of the league's 30 teams. The In The Paint Set includes 31 uniforms, including all 30 NBA teams. 

Also available, grab the Shoot & Score Pack to get the Hookshot Emote and Mini Hoop Back Bling, which can feature the logo of all 30 NBA teams. When other players have the Mini Hoop Back Bling equipped, you‚Äôll be able to call your shot! 

If you‚Äôre more of a point guard, show off your handles with the Dribblin' traversal Emote.

#FortniteNBA #TheCrossover #FortniteNBATheCrossover

snippet.title: Brawl Stars: Meet Squeak! - Brawler Spotlight
snippet.description:
Download NOW!! ‚Ėļ‚Ėļ https://supr.cl/playbrawl
Be a BRAWLER! Subscribe! ‚Ėļ‚Ėļ https://supr.cl/subscribe

Fast-paced 3v3 multiplayer and battle royale made for mobile! Play with friends or solo across a variety of game modes in under three minutes.

Unlock and upgrade dozens of Brawlers with powerful Super abilities, Star Powers and Gadgets! Collect unique skins to stand out and show off. Battle in a variety of mysterious locations within the Brawliverse!

BATTLE IN MULTIPLE GAME MODES
- Gem Grab (3v3): Team up and out-strategize the opposing team. Collect and hold 10 gems to win, but get fragged and lose your gems.
- Showdown (Solo/Duo): A battle royale style fight for survival. Collect power ups for your Brawler. Grab a friend or play solo - be the last Brawler standing in the rowdiest battle royale yet. Winner take all!
- Brawl Ball (3v3): It's a whole new Brawl game! Show off your soccer/football skills and score two goals before the other team. There are no red cards here.
- Bounty (3v3): Take out opponents to earn stars, but don‚Äôt let them pick you off. The squad with the most stars wins the match!
- Heist (3v3): Protect your team‚Äôs safe and try to crack open your opponents‚Äô. Navigate the map to sneak, blast and blow your way clear to the enemies treasure.
- Special Events: Limited time special PvE and PvP game modes.
- Championship Challenge: Join Brawl Stars' esports scene with in-game qualifiers!

UNLOCK AND UPGRADE BRAWLERS
Collect and upgrade a variety of Brawlers with powerful Super abilities, Star Powers and Gadgets! Level them up and collect unique skins.

BRAWL PASS
Complete quests, open Brawl Boxes, earn Gems, pins and an exclusive Brawl Pass skin! Fresh content every season.

BECOME THE STAR PLAYER
Climb the local and regional leaderboards to prove you‚Äôre the greatest Brawler of them all!

CONSTANTLY EVOLVING
Look out for new Brawlers, skins, maps, special events and games modes in the future.

PLEASE NOTE! Brawl Stars is free to download and play, however, some game items can also be purchased for real money. If you don't want to use this feature, please disable in-app purchases in your device's settings. Also, under our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy, you must be at least 9 years of age to play or download Brawl Stars.

Features:
- Team up for real-time 3v3 battles against players from across the world
- A fast-paced multiplayer battle royale mode made for mobile
- Unlock and collect new, powerful Brawlers - each with a signature attack and Super ability
- New events and game modes daily
- Battle solo or with friends
- Climb to the top of the leaderboards in global and local rankings 
- Join or start your own Club with fellow players to share tips and battle together
- Customize Brawlers with unlockable skins
- Player-designed maps offer challenging new terrain to master

From the makers of Clash of Clans, Clash Royale and Boom Beach!

Support:
Contact us in-game via Settings, Help and Support ‚ÄĒ or visit http://supercell.helpshift.com/a/brawl-stars/

Privacy Policy:
http://supercell.com/en/privacy-policy/

Terms of Service:
http://supercell.com/en/terms-of-service/

snippet.title: Fraude Loter√≠a Nacional: ¬ŅCaer√°n los verdaderos jefes de la mafia, como el caso Marzouka? | (1/3)
snippet.description:
Ver completo: 
Parte 1: https://youtu.be/UdRDnmjZ004
Parte 2: https://youtu.be/SocSBSF0uTo
Parte 3: https://youtu.be/pcwyUJFAcjk

El administrador de la Loter√≠a Nacional, Luis Maisichell Dicent Dicent, se encuentra entre los 54 accionistas del Grupo Empresarial Dominicano (Gedom), que se dedica a la venta, producci√≥n y comercializaci√≥n de sorteos, lotos y juegos de azar, pese a haber afirmado al programa Nuria Investigaci√≥n Period√≠stica: ‚ÄúNunca he tenido bancas. Esa es otra de las falacias que yo tengo. Yo nunca he tenido bancas en mi vida‚ÄĚ.

Dicent atribuy√≥ su participaci√≥n en Fenabanca como vocero a su formaci√≥n en administraci√≥n de empresas y no a que es propietario de bancas. Sin embargo, en su declaraci√≥n jurada de bienes colgada en el portal web de la Loter√≠a, aparece como accionista con 250 cuotas sociales, por un valor de 250 mil pesos, en la empresa nacional Gedon, con N en lugar de M, como consta en el certificado de registro mercantil de la C√°mara de Comercio y Producci√≥n de Santo Domingo, Gedom.

Las evidencias fueron mostradas durante un reportaje en el que Nuria Investigaci√≥n Period√≠stica compara el supuesto fraude ocurrido durante el sorteo del pasado primero de mayo y el caso de Frederick Marzouka, empresario haitiano que fue acusado por la administraci√≥n de la Loter√≠a Nacional de 1997 de encabezar una mafia dentro de esa instituci√≥n.

P√°gina Oficial de Nuria Piera.
N digital: El peri√≥dico con las noticias en tiempo real. Con el sello de transparencia de Nuria Piera.

El programa Nuria sale al aire por Color Visi√≥n: s√°bados a las 9:00 p.m. y por CDN: lunes a las 8:00 p.m.

localized.title: Fraude Loter√≠a Nacional: ¬ŅCaer√°n los verdaderos jefes de la mafia, como el caso Marzouka? | (1/3)
localized.description:
Ver completo: 
Parte 1: https://youtu.be/UdRDnmjZ004
Parte 2: https://youtu.be/SocSBSF0uTo
Parte 3: https://youtu.be/pcwyUJFAcjk

El administrador de la Loter√≠a Nacional, Luis Maisichell Dicent Dicent, se encuentra entre los 54 accionistas del Grupo Empresarial Dominicano (Gedom), que se dedica a la venta, producci√≥n y comercializaci√≥n de sorteos, lotos y juegos de azar, pese a haber afirmado al programa Nuria Investigaci√≥n Period√≠stica: ‚ÄúNunca he tenido bancas. Esa es otra de las falacias que yo tengo. Yo nunca he tenido bancas en mi vida‚ÄĚ.

Dicent atribuy√≥ su participaci√≥n en Fenabanca como vocero a su formaci√≥n en administraci√≥n de empresas y no a que es propietario de bancas. Sin embargo, en su declaraci√≥n jurada de bienes colgada en el portal web de la Loter√≠a, aparece como accionista con 250 cuotas sociales, por un valor de 250 mil pesos, en la empresa nacional Gedon, con N en lugar de M, como consta en el certificado de registro mercantil de la C√°mara de Comercio y Producci√≥n de Santo Domingo, Gedom.

Las evidencias fueron mostradas durante un reportaje en el que Nuria Investigaci√≥n Period√≠stica compara el supuesto fraude ocurrido durante el sorteo del pasado primero de mayo y el caso de Frederick Marzouka, empresario haitiano que fue acusado por la administraci√≥n de la Loter√≠a Nacional de 1997 de encabezar una mafia dentro de esa instituci√≥n.

El lugar fue redescubierto reci√©n en 1911 por un investigador estadounidense, aunque se cree que la gente del lugar ya lo conoc√≠a. Igualmente, reci√©n ah√≠ tom√≥ la fama mundial que merece, m√°s de tres siglos despu√©s de haber sido abandonado. 

Machu Picchu es una de las grandes atracciones tur√≠sticas de Sudam√©rica. Antes de la pandemia, un mill√≥n y medio de personas visitaban las ruinas cada a√Īo. Los amantes del trekking y la naturaleza podr√°n recorrer tambi√©n los distintos caminos trazados en la √©poca incaica.

en.title: Machu Picchu, the most spectacular place in South America
en.description:
Hidden between two mountains in the Peruvian Andes, Machu Picchu is a symbol of the greatness of the Inca civilization. The farming systems, the roads and the incredible architecture of the Incas are reflected in this place.

The place was only rediscovered in 1911 by an American researcher, although it is believed that the locals already knew it. Likewise, it was only there that it took on the world fame it deserves, more than three centuries after being abandoned.

Machu Picchu is one of the great tourist attractions in South America. Before the pandemic, one and a half million people visited the ruins every year. Lovers of trekking and nature will also be able to travel the different paths traced in Inca times.

snippet.title: Little Mix - Confetti (Acoustic)
snippet.description:
Little Mix - Confetti (Acoustic Version) 

Listen to the new single ‚ÄėConfetti‚Äô feat Saweetie: http://lttlmx.com/singleconfetti

Listen to the album 'Confetti': http://lttlmx.com/confetti ‚Ä™‚Ä¨‚Ä¨‚Ä¨‚Ä¨

Listen On Amazon Music - https://smarturl.it/LittleMix_Amazon ‚Ä¨
Subscribe on YouTube - http://lttlmx.com/SubscribeYT

Musical Director:  Donavan Hepburn 
Vocal Arrangement: Joshua Alamu 
Guitar by: Daniel Hutchinson
Engineered by: Rob Derbyshire
Mixed by: Rob Derbyshire

Lyrics: 

We wanna celebrate like we in the club every day
Got all my friends here with me
And I don't need ya, I don't need ya
 
Got this dress up on me
So I don't need your stress up on me
Baby, we're done, c'est la vie
Now I don't need ya, I don't need ya
 
Should've left your ass from time ago
Didn't love me then, but now I do
I used to sit at home and cry for you
Diamonds on my neck, I shine for you
Ain't blocking my blessings anymore
Never be the girl I was before
I'ma let the good things in my life rain down
 
From the sky, drop like confetti
All eyes on me, so V.I.P
All of my dreams, from the sky, drop like confetti
Drop it down
You're missin' me, but I'm finally free
I got what I need, so let it rain down like Confetti
 
Flashing lights, I ain't got no worry on my mind
Know that you're mad, I realised
That I don't need ya, I don't need ya
 
So, DJ, say my name like it's my birthday
You're just a memory
And, boy, I don't need ya, I don't need ya
 
Should've left your ass from time ago (time ago)
Didn't love me then, but now I do (now I do)
I'ma let the good things in my life rain down
 
From the sky, drop like confetti
All eyes on me (on me, yeah), so v.I.p
All of my dreams, from the sky, drop like confetti (woah)
Drop it down
You're missin' me, but I'm finally free (finally free)
I got what I need, so let it rain down like confetti
Down (Oh, la-la-la)
Rain down (oh, la-la-la)
Let it, let it rain down (oh, la-la-la) ‚Äď leigh ad lib
Let it rain down (oh, la-la-la) -  leigh ad lib 

From the sky, drop like confetti (yeah)
All eyes on me, so V.I.P
All of my dreams (all of my dreams, whoa)
From the sky, drop like confetti
You're missin' me (you're missing me)

I'm totally free (I'm finally free)
I got what I need (I've got what I need)

La violencia entre jud√≠os y √°rabes se extiende en las ciudades mixtas de Israel (con importante presencia √°rabe-israel√≠), lo que abre un frente interno al gobierno israel√≠ mientras contin√ļa la escalada b√©lica en Gaza iniciada el pasado lunes. 

Grupos de ciudadanos √°rabes y jud√≠os se han enfrentado y se han producido dos linchamientos: el de un √°rabe en Bat Yam y el de un jud√≠o en Acre. Ambos se encuentran en estado grave.

El ministro israel√≠, Benjam√≠n Netanyahu, ha advertido que "nada justifica el linchamiento de jud√≠os por parte de √°rabes y nada justifica el linchamiento de √°rabes por parte de jud√≠os". Por su parte, el presidente, Rub√©n Rivlin, ha descrito los incidentes como "una guerra civil sin raz√≥n", y ha pedido a las autoridades locales y religiosas que intervengan para detener la violencia.

snippet.title: Dua Lipa - Future Nostalgia Medley (Live at the BRIT Awards 2021)
snippet.description:
#DuaLipa #FutureNostalgia #BRITAwards2021
Subscribe to the Dua Lipa channel for all the best and latest official music videos, behind the scenes and live performances. 
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC-J-KZfRV8c13fOCkhXdLiQ?sub_confirmation=1

See more official videos from Dua Lipa here:
https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLNrotoZZ8BaoXT_LJuwEyESQlctWNDCwD

Get the album Future Nostalgia : https://dualipa.co/futurenostalgia

Listen to more from the album 'Future Nostalgia' :
https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLNrotoZZ8BaouNABcO_A9Xkn_Nkz0PT11

Follow Dua Lipa:
Instagram:  https://dualipa.co/instagram
Facebook: http://dualipa.co/facebook
TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@dualipaofficial
Twitter: http://dualipa.co/twitter
YouTube: https://dualipa.co/youtube

About Dua Lipa:
Born and raised in London to Kosovar-Albanian parents Dua Lipa signed to Warner Records in 2015, releasing her self titled debut in 2017 which featured the hit singles, 'Be The One', 'IDGAF', 'Hotter Than Hell' & her first UK #1 hit 'New Rules'. 

Critical success soon followed as Dua Lipa picked up Brit Awards for 'Best Female Solo Artist' and 'Best British Breakthrough Act' as well as Grammy Awards for 'Best New Artist' and 'Best Dance Recording' for the track 'Electricity' in collaboration with Silk City.

Her second internationally acclaimed studio album 'Future Nostalgia' was released in 2020 and included the hit singles 'Don't Start Now, 'Break My Heart', 'Hallucinate' and 'Levitating', with the remix album 'Club Future Nostalgia' following shortly after featuring guest appearances from 'Blackpink', 'Missy Elliott', 'Madonna' and 'Gwen Stefani'.

snippet.title: Olivia Rodrigo - drivers license (Live From The BRIT Awards 2021)
snippet.description:
Olivia Rodrigo Performs 'drivers license' Live at the BRIT Awards 2021

Shop SOUR: https://smarturl.it/oliviarodrigoshop

Lyrics:

I got my driver's license last week
Just like we always talked about
'Cause you were so excited for me
To finally drive up to your house
But today I drove through the suburbs
Crying 'cause you weren't around

And you're probably with that blonde girl
Who always made me doubt
She's so much older than me
She's everything I'm insecure about
Yeah, today I drove through the suburbs
'Cause how could I ever love someone else?

And I know we weren't perfect but I've never felt this way for no one
And I just can't imagine how you could be so okay now that I'm gone
Guess you didn't mean what you wrote in that song about me
'Cause you said forever, now I drive alone past your street

And all my friends are tired
Of hearing how much I miss you, but
I kinda feel sorry for them
'Cause they'll never know you the way that I do, yeah
Today I drove through the suburbs
And pictured I was driving home to you

And I know we weren't perfect
But I've never felt this way for no one, oh
And I just can't imagine how you could be so okay, now that I'm gone
I guess you didn't mean what you wrote in that song about me
'Cause you said forever, now I drive alone past your street

Red lights, stop signs
I still see your face in the white cars, front yards
Can't drive past the places we used to go to
'Cause I still fuckin' love you, babe (ooh, ooh, ooh, ooh)
Sidewalks we crossed
I still hear your voice in the traffic, we're laughing
Over all the noise
God, I'm so blue, know we're through
But I still fuckin' love you, babe (ooh, ooh, ooh, ooh)

I know we weren't perfect but I've never felt this way for no one
And I just can't imagine how you could be so okay, now that I'm gone
'Cause you didn't mean what you wrote in that song about me
'Cause you said forever, now I drive alone past your street
Yeah, you said forever, now I drive alone past your street

I guess you didn't mean what you wrote in that song about me
'Cause you said forever, now I drive alone past your street

Red lights, stop signs
I still see your face in the white cars, front yards
Can't drive past the places we used to go to
'Cause I still fuckin' love you, babe (ooh, ooh, ooh, ooh)
Sidewalks we crossed
I still hear your voice in the traffic, we're laughing
Over all the noise
God, I'm so blue, know we're through
But I still fuckin' love you, babe (ooh, ooh, ooh, ooh)

I know we weren't perfect but I've never felt this way for no one
And I just can't imagine how you could be so okay, now that I'm gone

snippet.title: Olivia Rodrigo - deja vu (Live Performance) | Vevo LIFT
snippet.description:
Olivia Rodrigo - deja vu (Live Performance) | Vevo LIFT

She played Paige and Nini, and fans loved her in both roles. But acting isn‚Äôt the only thing that Olivia Rodrigo is great at. When the ‚ÄėHigh School Musical: The Musical: The Series‚Äô  star dropped her ‚Äúdrivers license‚ÄĚ video back at the start of the year, the overwhelming response made it clear that she had a way of deeply communicating with listeners not only as an actor, but as an artist. Views-wise, it crossed the 200-million mark in just four months. Pretty impressive for someone who had never put out an album on her own. Rodrigo, who proved ‚Äúdrivers license‚ÄĚ was no fluke when ‚Äúdeja vu‚ÄĚ also hit a home run upon release last month, is fixing that. Her ‚ÄėSour‚Äô debut arrives on May 21, and by the time it gets here, she will have performed at both the BRIT Awards and Saturday Night Live. Billboard reports that the 18-year-old pop phenom is the ‚Äúfirst artist to send her first two proper singles straight into the Hot 100‚Äôs top 10.‚ÄĚ The SoCal native, who wrote ‚Äúdriver‚Äôs license‚ÄĚ with her pal Dan Nigro, recently told the press that she was obsessed with emotions, and loved her jobs as both actor and musician because they allow her to be so expressive. We‚Äôre thrilled that we got to work with Olivia on designing our exclusive LIFT content. A few weeks ago we hit the L.A., connected with Team Rodrigo, and came home with the kind of pieces that will give fans a revealing look into the singer‚Äôs personality, two unique performances and an exclusive interview portrait. First up is ‚Äúdeja vu,‚ÄĚ and the setting couldn‚Äôt be any more fun.  ‚ÄúThese pieces look amazing on film,‚ÄĚ says Rodrigo. ‚ÄúIt captures the tone of my work in a really powerful way.‚ÄĚ  Hang tight, there‚Äôs more Olivia on the way.
 
Watch the official video of "deja vu": https://youtu.be/cii6ruuycQA
 
Watch Olivia Rodrigo videos: https://bit.ly/3eLiKRH
 
Follow Olivia Rodrigo
